creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Did you installed stuff from ports tree. Then later install gnome-lite  
package? It sounds like you did. You can't really mix the ports and  
package, because the package are not always up to date with the ports tree.

If not, please follow here link too:  
http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html

Cheers,
Mezz


-- 
mezz7@cox.net  -  mezz@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD GNOME Team
http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome/  -  gnome@FreeBSD.org
